title: Haffner Energy and IГѓВ°unnH2 Sign a Key Agreement to Reduce Costs and Secure Carbon Supply for IcelandГўв‚¬в„ўs Largest e-SAF Project
content: Haffner Energy, a leading biomass-to-clean fuels solutions provider, and IГѓВ°unnH2, a green hydrogen developer, have signed an agreement aimed at integrating Haffner EnergyГўв‚¬в„ўs unique technology in the 65,000 tonnes/year eSAF facility under development by IГѓВ°unnH2. The project is located nearKeflavГѓВ­k International Airport in Iceland. It is slated to combine greenhydrogen from IcelandГўв‚¬в„ўs renewable power grid with competitive biogeniccarbon from Haffner EnergyГўв‚¬в„ўs patented biocarbon gasification technology toproduce Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF) for use on todayГўв‚¬в„ўs aircraft.
author: Analysts Account
